data.chapter_title_en: Invocations after the final Tash-ahhud and before ending the prayer
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ، وَشُكْرِكَ، وَحُسْنِ عِبادَتِكَ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best of manners.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma aAAinnee AAala thikrik, washukrik, wahusni AAibadatik.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma aAAinnee AAala thikrik, washukrik, wahusni AAibadatik.)
